title: Consent for Photo/Video Recording and Public Disclosure
content:
Consent for Photo/Video Recording and Public Disclosure

Last updated 6 Mar 2026

EN KA

Consent for Photo/Video Recording and Public Disclosure

Ridetech Georgia LLC (ID no: 402218890) will record photo/video material during the event for the purpose of informing the public about the event (for marketing purposes). The recorded photo/video material and full name will be disseminated for the same purpose through the company’s official social media channels and Internet sites.

The photo or video material, full name will be stored and will remain available for as long as the material is published or until the consent is withdrawn.

You are entitled to exercise the rights guaranteed under Chapter III of the Law of Georgia “On Personal Data Protection”, including the right to withdraw the consent given by you at any time. To withdraw your consent, you may contact the company at the following email address: data_privacy@yandex-team.com .

In case of withdrawal of consent, the company will cease further processing of the data and delete the photo/video material, unless another legal basis for the processing of personal data exists.

Please note that withdrawal of consent does not invalidate the legal consequences arising from the processing carried out before the withdrawal of consent and within the scope of such consent.

Consent

I acknowledge that my personal data (photo/video image, full name) is processed based on my consent and I hereby consent to the company to: record my photo/video material during the event; publicly disseminate my photo/video material through the company’s official social media channels.
